description: This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. In the Leatherworking Patterns category.
name: Pattern: Nethercleft Leg Armor

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Pattern: Nethercleft Leg Armor Phase 1 Item Level 73 Binds when picked up Requires Leatherworking (365) Requires Cenarion Expedition - Exalted Use: Teaches you how to make Nethercleft Leg Armor. Sell Price: 3 Nethercleft Leg Armor Item Level 73 Requires Level 60 Use: Permanently attach nethercleft leg armor onto pants to increase Stamina by 40 and Agility by 12. Max Stack: 20 Sell Price: 4 Requires Heavy Knothide Leather (4), Thick Clefthoof Leather (16), Primal Earth (8), Primal Nether This leatherworking pattern is used for the Leatherworking profession. It is sold by Fedryen Swiftspear. In the Leatherworking Patterns category.
